# Lightweight App Baseline

## Purpose
Use this artifact when `PRF-07` is active for a small web app, simple internal tool, or lightweight app.

## App Boundary
- Product source root:
- Runtime / framework:
- Rendering / app mode:
- Data persistence boundary:
- Auth / user identity requirement:
- External API / integration boundary:
- Deployment target:

|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |

## Escalation Triggers
- Durable data becomes business-critical:
- Authentication or permissions expand:
- Workflow approval appears:
- Migration or reconciliation appears:
- Audit/security requirement appears:
